summary: Completed testing of Blendlink legal pages, offers system, and guest checkout features. All 15 backend tests pass. All 10 requested features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal pages, offers system, and guest checkout all working. Stripe integration configured with test keys.

feature_1_privacy_policy_route.details: /privacypolicy route loads correctly with full Privacy Policy content

feature_2_terms_of_service_route.details: /termsofservice route loads correctly with full Terms of Service content

feature_3_footer_legal_links.details: Footer on landing page has Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links with data-testid attributes

feature_4_copyright_2026.details: Footer shows '© 2026 Blendlink. All rights reserved.'

feature_5_buy_it_now_button.details: Listing detail page shows 'Buy It Now' button with data-testid='buy-now-btn'

feature_6_make_an_offer_button.details: Listing detail page shows 'Make an Offer' button with data-testid='make-offer-btn'

feature_7_buy_now_navigates_to_checkout.details: Clicking Buy It Now navigates to /checkout with item in cart

feature_8_guest_browse_marketplace.details: Guests can browse /marketplace and view /marketplace/:id listing details without login

feature_9_checkout_for_guests.details: Checkout page loads for guests with contact info form and Stripe payment

feature_10_offers_api_endpoints.details: POST /api/offers and GET /api/offers/my-offers endpoints exist and work with authentication

feature_11_marketplace_offers_page.details: /marketplace-offers page loads after login with tabs for All/Offers I Made/Offers Received

feature_12_make_offer_requires_login.details: Make an Offer button shows 'Please sign in to make an offer' toast for guests
